channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Week 1
item.description:
Markdown, Zettlr, and Summarising

In the first class, I learnt about wiki and how it works. I then proceeded to practice with Markdown and did an online excersice.

After that, I downloaded Zettlr to further help me with my Markdown practice. With the combination of my skills and a bit of research, I figured out how to represent mathematical equations using LATEX format.

Finally, me and my group split the chapter 8 and 9 from the book The Information: A History, a Theory, a Flood by James Gleick and took notes summarising it.

item.title: My Post
item.description: Hi! I’m Nithya, and this is my first post
